name: Grilled Chicken Ceasar Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 slices French bread (crusts removed), cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 lb cooked boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut cross-wise into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add bread cubes and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Drain on paper towels and set aside.
2. Mash anchovies, garlic, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt into a paste in a large salad bowl.
3. Add lemon juice, mustard, pepper sauce, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon pepper; whisk until blended.
4. Gradually whisk in the remaining 1/3 cup oil.
5. Add chicken and toss to coat.
6. Add lettuce, Parmesan cheese, and croutons; toss well.
Nutritional info per serving: 474 calories; 41g protein, 12g carbohydrates, 28g fat
